list.name: branch_id
list.label: Branch
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT branch_id FROM kaori.fact_bookings WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id'

targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(revenue) AS total FROM kaori.mv_revenue_by_day WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND branch_id IN ($branch_id) AND day >= today() - 30
SELECT sum(bookings) FROM kaori.mv_revenue_by_day WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND branch_id IN ($branch_id) AND day >= today() - 30

SELECT day AS time, branch_id, sum(revenue) AS revenue FROM kaori.mv_revenue_by_day WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND branch_id IN ($branch_id) AND $__timeFilter(day) GROUP BY day, branch_id ORDER BY day

panels.title: Top 10 dịch vụ (số lượt × doanh thu)

targets.rawSql: SELECT service_code, sum(times) AS times, sum(revenue) AS revenue FROM kaori.mv_top_services WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND branch_id IN ($branch_id) AND day >= today() - 30 GROUP BY service_code ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10
